ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation entry */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the mutation was observed */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site conducting the research */,
  "wildtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wildtype of the virus */,
  "mutation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation type */,
  "mut_escape" REAL /* Escape rate of the mutation */,
  "site_total_escape" REAL /* Total escape rate at the site */,
  "site_max_escape" REAL /* Maximum escape rate observed at the site */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species of the primate */,
  "virus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the virus being studied */,
  "mutation_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the mutation observed */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score of the mutation on viral escape */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the mutation entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the mutation entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_wildtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("wildtype_id") REFERENCES wildtypes ("wildtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_mutation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_type_id") REFERENCES mutation_types ("mutation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_virus_id FOREIGN KEY ("virus_id") REFERENCES viruses ("virus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the research site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for site inquiries */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the research site */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the site was established */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_score" REAL /* Score from the last inspection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the site entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the site entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the condition entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the condition entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wildtypes" (
  "wildtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wildtype */,
  "wildtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the wildtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wildtype characteristics */,
  "virus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the virus the wildtype belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the wildtype entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the wildtype entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wildtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wildtypes_virus_id FOREIGN KEY ("virus_id") REFERENCES viruses ("virus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_types" (
  "mutation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation type */,
  "mutation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutation type (e.g., A, C, D, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation type */,
  "impact_on_virus" TEXT /* Impact of the mutation type on the virus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the mutation type entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the mutation type entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "escape_metrics" (
  "escape_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each escape metric entry */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation associated with the metrics */,
  "site_total_escape" REAL /* Total escape rate for the site */,
  "site_max_escape" REAL /* Maximum escape rate recorded at the site */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the escape rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the escape metric entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the escape metric entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("escape_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_escape_metrics_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the study */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the researcher entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the researcher entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation being studied */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., in vitro, in vivo) */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the experiment results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the experiment entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the experiment entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the access log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Last password change time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the user entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the user entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the role entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the role entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the species entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the species entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viruses" (
  "virus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virus */,
  "virus_name" TEXT /* Name of the virus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the virus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the virus entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the virus entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("virus_id")
)
